use_codes.desc: IMPROVED WAKEFULNESS IN PATIENTS WITH EXCESSIVE DAYTIME SLEEPINESS ASSOCIATED WITH NARCOLEPSY

indications.text:
PROVIGIL is indicated to improve wakefulness in adult patients with excessive sleepiness associated with narcolepsy, obstructive
sleep apnea (OSA), or shift work disorder (SWD).
Limitations of Use
In OSA, PROVIGIL is indicated to treat excessive sleepiness and not as treatment for the underlying obs...

PROVIGIL is indicated to improve wakefulness in patients with excessive sleepiness
associated with narcolepsy, obstructive sleep apnea/hypopnea syndrome, and shift
work sleep disorder.
